message:
Running command: # write_views.tcl is a STANDALONE script (reads ODB itself). 
# The write_views PROC is in io.tcl.
# We should NOT source write_views.tcl - we should just call write_views directly
# since io.tcl is already loaded and the proc is defined.

cat > /tmp/grt_finish_v7.tcl << 'ENDSCRIPT'
# Manual GRT finisher v7 - no check_antennas, correct write_views call

set ::env(SCRIPTS_DIR) /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts
set ::env(STEP_DIR) /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting
set ::env(_TCL_ENV_IN) $::env(STEP_DIR)/_env.tcl

source $::env(_TCL_ENV_IN)

set ::env(SCRIPTS_DIR) /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts

# Runtime env vars
set PDK_LIB /nc/pdk/ciel/sky130/versions/0fe599b2afb6708d281543108caf8310912f54af/sky130A/libs.ref/sky130_fd_sc_hd/lib
set ::env(_PNR_LIBS) "$PDK_LIB/sky130_fd_sc_hd__tt_025C_1v80.lib $PDK_LIB/sky130_fd_sc_hd__ss_100C_1v60.lib $PDK_LIB/sky130_fd_sc_hd__ff_n40C_1v95.lib"
set SRAM_LIB /nc/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/v2.2.0-nc/lib
set ::env(_MACRO_LIBS) "$SRAM_LIB/CF_SRAM_1024x32_tt_180V_25C.lib"
set ::env(_SDC_IN) $::env(PNR_SDC_FILE)
set ::env(_PNR_EXCLUDED_CELLS) ""

# Load io.tcl (defines all procs including write_views)
source $::env(SCRIPTS_DIR)/openroad/common/io.tcl

# Read ODB (step 29 DetailedPlacement)
read_current_odb

# Load GRT guide
puts "Loading global routing guide..."
read_guides $::env(STEP_DIR)/after_grt.guide

# Parasitics estimation
puts "Running set_rc..."
source $::env(SCRIPTS_DIR)/openroad/common/set_rc.tcl
puts "Estimating parasitics..."
estimate_parasitics -global_routing

# Write views using the proc from io.tcl (NOT by sourcing write_views.tcl)
puts "Writing views (calling proc directly)..."
write_views

puts "SUCCESS: GRT views written. Skipped check_antennas (VCCD/VSSD PSM)."
ENDSCRIPT

STEP32="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting"

nohup /nix/store/zzypcxbrgw1qink1l7fwgwpbk7fvdwpg-openroad/bin/openroad \
    -no_splash \
    -exit \
    -metrics "$STEP32/or_metrics_out.json" \
    /tmp/grt_finish_v7.tcl \
    > /tmp/grt_finish.log 2>&1 &

echo "OpenROAD PID: $!"
echo $! > /tmp/grt_finish.pid

sleep 120
ps -p $(cat /tmp/grt_finish.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED"
tail -20 /tmp/grt_finish.log

function.name: execute_bash
